propositions: The old "two green votes means it will land" model is broken because a conflict blocks landing while votes stay green, so docs must teach the new single-outcome contract.
Rewrite the landing section in CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md to instruct agents to set the Autosubmit label / run land and act on the single typed outcome rather than watching votes.
Grep the entire repo for the deprecated "two green votes"/"watch votes" pattern and update all occurrences, not just CLAUDE.md and CONTRIBUTING.md.

Record the auto-lander design and rationale in docs/adr/0042, capturing the agent contract, R5 safety invariant, eight prior-art-grounded design decisions, separation-of-concerns boundary, reliability posture with single-instance SPOF, and deferrals with promotion triggers.
Confirm both deferral idea ids resolve in the store and anchor ADR-0042 to them.
Docs must cross-reference ADR-0040 and ADR-0041 as the gate substrate the lander sits on, and must not merge until the Autosubmit label and land command are live.
